name: Gyrocopter
description: So much for being retired… Aurel, the Gyrocopter.

abilities.name: Afterburner
abilities.description: Both attack damage and spell damage instance sourced to Gyrocopter grants self a movement speed bonus stack per affected enemy hero for a certain duration.

abilities.name: Rocket Barrage
abilities.description: Launches a salvo of rockets at nearby enemy units in a radius around the Gyrocopter.

abilities.name: Homing Missile
abilities.description: Applies of Gyrocopter's corresponding ability level when acquired. Launches the second upon the first missile's impact, or upon the first missile being destroyed.

abilities.name: Flak Cannon
abilities.description: Attack modifiers only affects the primary attacked target.

abilities.name: Call Down
abilities.description: Call down a series of aerial missile strikes that slow and damage enemy units in a target area.
